# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.

Prevent envoy admin interface exposed.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: admin
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 127.0.0.1
        port_value: 9901
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@@': 'envoy.config.http.connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager'
          stat_prefix: admin
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: local_service
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: '/healthcheck'
                route:
                  cluster_name: envoy-admin
              - match:
                  prefix: '/stats'
                route:
                  cluster_name: envoy-admin

  clusters:
  - name: envoy-admin
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: strict_dns
    lb_policy: round_robin
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: 127.0.0.1
        port_value: 9901

access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/access.log

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: envoy
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@@': 'envoy.config.http.connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager'
          stat_prefix: envoy
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: local_service
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: '/'
                route:
                  cluster_name: upstream

  clusters:
  - name: upstream
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: strict_dns
    lb_policy: round_robin
    hosts:
    - socket_address:
        address: 127.0.0.1
        port_value: 8080

service:
  nodes:
  - id: envoy-1
    cluster: upstream
